recommended_actions.title: Reconcile conflicting evidence before repair

recommended_actions.title: Follow SOP: DRY-122 Instrument Verification
recommended_actions.detail: Per SOP section 'DRY-122 Instrument Verification': Compare controller temperature with an independent calibrated sensor.; Check alarm timestamp alignment before replacing the heater or controller.; Record controller output and heater current.

recommended_actions.title: Follow SOP: AIR-305 Fan Frequency Verification
recommended_actions.detail: Per SOP section 'AIR-305 Fan Frequency Verification': Compare inverter command frequency with measured fan frequency.; Inspect the inverter cooling path and airflow filter.; Verify power quality before changing inverter parameters.
